mapper.sql: id, projectCode, projectName, projectState, officeCode, customerCode, customerName, marketName, systemName, expendName, industryName, notGrantTailCause, orderCreateTime, projectType, projectCategory, implType, implReadonly, finalCustomerName, backReason, customerProjectName, salesType, compId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, projectStartTime, projectEndTime, projectRefreshTime, customInfo, customConfig
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_project (id, projectCode, projectName, projectState, officeCode, customerCode, customerName, marketName, systemName, expendName, industryName, notGrantTailCause, orderCreateTime, projectType, projectCategory, implType, implReadonly, finalCustomerName, backReason, customerProjectName, salesType, compId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, projectStartTime, projectEndTime, projectRefreshTime, customInfo, customConfig ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{officeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},OTHERarketName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{systemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expendName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{industryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{notGrantTailCause,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderCreateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{implType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{implReadonly,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{finalCustomerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{backReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{compId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{projectStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{projectEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{projectRefreshTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}, #{customConfig,jdbcType=JSON} )

mapper.update:
update pm_project
projectCode = #{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
projectName = #{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
projectState = #{projectState,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
officeCode = #{officeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerCode = #{customerCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerName = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
marketName = #{marketName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
systemName = #{systemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expendName = #{expendName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
industryName = #{industryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
notGrantTailCause = #{notGrantTailCause,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orderCreateTime = #{orderCreateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
projectType = #{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
projectCategory = #{projectCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
implType = #{implType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
implReadonly = #{implReadonly,jdbcType=INTEGER},
finalCustomerName = #{finalCustomerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
backReason = #{backReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customerProjectName = #{customerProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salesType = #{salesType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
compId = #{compId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
projectStartTime = #{projectStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
projectEndTime = #{projectEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
projectRefreshTime = #{projectRefreshTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
customInfo = #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON},
customConfig = #{customConfig,jdbcType=JSON},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update pm_project set projectCode = #{projectCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, projectName = #{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, projectState = #{projectState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, officeCode = #{officeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customerCode = #{customerCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customerName = #{customerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, marketName = #{marketName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, systemName = #{systemName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expendName = #{expendName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, industryName = #{industryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, notGrantTailCause = #{notGrantTailCause,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orderCreateTime = #{orderCreateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, projectType = #{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, projectCategory = #{projectCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, implType = #{implType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, implReadonly = #{implReadonly,jdbcType=INTEGER}, finalCustomerName = #{finalCustomerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, backReason = #{backReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customerProjectName = #{customerProjectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, salesType = #{salesType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, compId = #{compId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, projectStartTime = #{projectStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, projectEndTime = #{projectEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, projectRefreshTime = #{projectRefreshTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, customInfo = #{customInfo,jdbcType=JSON}, customConfig = #{customConfig,jdbcType=JSON} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

select * from pm_project
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectCode = #{model.projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
projectName = #{model.projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
projectState = #{model.projectState, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
officeCode = #{model.officeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
customerCode = #{model.customerCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
customerName = #{model.customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
marketName = #{model.marketName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
systemName = #{model.systemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
expendName = #{model.expendName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
industryName = #{model.industryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
notGrantTailCause = #{model.notGrantTailCause, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
orderCreateTime = #{model.orderCreateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
projectType = #{model.projectType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
projectCategory = #{model.projectCategory, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
implType = #{model.implType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
implReadonly = #{model.implReadonly, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
finalCustomerName = #{model.finalCustomerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
backReason = #{model.backReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
customerProjectName = #{model.customerProjectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
salesType = #{model.salesType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compId = #{model.compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
projectStartTime = #{model.projectStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
projectEndTime = #{model.projectEndTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
projectRefreshTime = #{model.projectRefreshTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
customInfo = #{model.customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
customConfig = #{model.customConfig, jdbcType=JSON} AND
( projectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or projectState like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or officeCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customerCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customerName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or marketName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or systemName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or expendName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or industryName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or notGrantTailCause like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or projectType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or projectCategory like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or implType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or finalCustomerName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or backReason like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customerProjectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or salesType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customConfig like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from pm_project
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
projectCode = #{model.projectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
projectName = #{model.projectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
projectState = #{model.projectState, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

industryName = #{model.industryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
notGrantTailCause = #{model.notGrantTailCause, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
orderCreateTime = #{model.orderCreateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
projectType = #{model.projectType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
projectCategory = #{model.projectCategory, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

finalCustomerName = #{model.finalCustomerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
backReason = #{model.backReason, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
customerProjectName = #{model.customerProjectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
salesType = #{model.salesType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compId = #{model.compId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
projectStartTime = #{model.projectStartTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
projectEndTime = #{model.projectEndTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
projectRefreshTime = #{model.projectRefreshTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
customInfo = #{model.customInfo, jdbcType=JSON} AND
customConfig = #{model.customConfig, jdbcType=JSON} AND
( projectCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or projectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or projectState like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or officeCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customerCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customerName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or marketName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or systemName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or expendName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or industryName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or notGrantTailCause like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or projectType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or projectCategory like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or implType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or finalCustomerName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or backReason like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customerProjectName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or salesType like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customConfig like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
